Add production simulation test suite across 6 workstreams

- WS1: 66 Python SDK unit tests (decorators, types, client, langchain, MCP)
- WS2: 10 Rust criterion benchmarks for guardrails evaluation latency
- WS3: 6 full-stack enforcement tests (escalate verdict, policy hot-reload,
  DLP enforcement, concurrent tool calls, budget exhaustion, budget
  request_increase)
- WS4: 4 multi-agent scenario tests (different policies, separate budgets,
  multi-tenant isolation, agent lifecycle simulation)
- WS5: 3 Docker integration tests behind build tag (container lifecycle,
  isolation tier security, egress enforcement)
- WS6: 3 missing coverage tests (heartbeat loop, sandbox status, stream events)
- Test agent fixture for real-agent-in-container testing

commit.message:
fix: replace broken Str non-greedy regex and assert false branches (#142)

1. text_verifier.ml: Replace `Str.regexp ".*?"` (OCaml Str does not support
   non-greedy quantifiers) with iterative `strip_tag_blocks` that correctly
   handles multiple <script>/<style> blocks without over-matching.

2. figma_mcp_protocol.ml: Replace `assert false` in make_success_response and
   make_error_response with descriptive failwith messages including the
   unexpected message serialized as JSON.

feat: building queue, hero detail, world map bg, exit-to-wallet button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Complete Phase 1: TOML config, interest profile, SQLite store, review workflow

Scoring
- Replace keyword TOPIC_TAGS with a natural language INTEREST_PROFILE passed
  directly to the LLM; tuning is now a prose edit in .content-discovery.toml
- Add few-shot feedback loop: 10 most recently kept and dismissed titles are
  injected into every scoring prompt, sharpening results over time

Storage
- Add store.py: SQLite-backed staging layer replacing state.py JSON dedup
- Items are stored after scoring (status='new') and updated on review
  (status='kept'|'dismissed'); INSERT OR IGNORE prevents overwriting decisions
- get_examples() supplies the kept/dismissed history for few-shot prompting

Workflow
- Add --review flag: interactive triage (y/n/s/o) before writing to Obsidian
- Kept items are written to the inbox in a single append; dismissed items
  feed back into the scorer on the next run
- Add --cached / --limit flags for feed caching and scoring caps
- Add feed_cache.py: MD5-keyed JSON cache under ~/.cache/content-discovery/

Config
- .content-discovery.toml (gitignored) overrides all config.py defaults
- TOML covers feeds, interest profile, threshold, provider, vault/inbox paths
- .content-discovery.toml.example committed as the setup template
- vault_path now optional; clearer error when missing and --dry-run is not set

Code cleanup (post-review)
- Remove state.py and tests/test_state.py (superseded by store.py)
- Add InboxEntry.format_plain() for terminal output; format_candidate() now
  delegates to it, eliminating duplicated field logic
- Fix datetime.utcnow() → datetime.now(timezone.utc) (Python 3.12 deprecation)
- Add logging.warning() for items skipped due to invalid LLM responses
- Replace time.sleep() in test_most_recent_first with explicit SQL timestamps
- Add .claude/ to .gitignore

59 tests passing.

commit.message:
Implement auth endpoints with JWT, OAuth, and hCaptcha

Services:
- jwt_service: access token (15min) + refresh token (7d) creation
- oauth_service: Google token verification via tokeninfo endpoint,
  Apple Sign In via JWKS + RS256 verification
- captcha_service: hCaptcha verification (skippable in dev)
- auth_service: orchestrates register, login, refresh, and user
  context loading with full player/alliance/state role resolution

Endpoints:
- POST /auth/register — hCaptcha + OAuth verify → create User + Player (pending)
- POST /auth/login — OAuth verify → find User → return JWT pair
- POST /auth/refresh — exchange refresh token for new pair
- GET /auth/me — load fresh user context from DB
- POST /auth/dev-login — dev-only test login (creates State 441, WOO alliance)
- GET /onboarding/states — public state search for registration flow
- GET /onboarding/states/{id}/alliances — list approved alliances

All error responses use error codes (not strings) per PRD requirement.
Backend returns codes, frontend will translate via i18n.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix hash-based category filter parsing for Vision & Strategy

The %26 in #cat=Vision%20%26%20Strategy was decoded to & before
URLSearchParams, which treated it as a parameter separator — breaking
the filter on all language versions. Now passes raw hash to
URLSearchParams (which handles %26 correctly) and encodes only values
in writeHashState.

commit.message:
fix: ADOS uses flat rate per assessment, not rate × hours

ADOS assessments count as 3 hours toward hourly requirements but are
paid/billed as a flat rate per session. The write_entry helper was
multiplying rate × qty (3.0) instead of using the flat rate. Fixed
session-based types to use rate × 1 for pay/bill while preserving
qty for hour tracking.

Note: existing ADOS time_entries need a one-time SQL fix to divide
est_pay_amount and est_bill_amount by 3.

- cursor-pointer on all interactive cards and pills
- "View case →" signifier on standard cards (hover)
- aria-pressed on filter toggles, semantic type="search"
- Author link underline on detail page

Feedback:
- active:scale/translate press feedback on cards, pills, buttons
- focus-visible:ring-2 on all interactive elements
- Search icon turns cyan on focus
- Clear button with visible hover/active states

Mapping:
- StatsBar columns with visual separators and bounded regions

Discoverability:
- "Scroll" label on hero scroll indicator
- View signifier visible on keyboard focus

Constraints:
- Improved empty state with recovery guidance + clear button

feat: annotation-service — OCR orchestration microservice

Hexagonal architecture (Spring Boot 4 + Java 25) that orchestrates
async OCR processing via Kafka: receives documents, publishes
document.received, listens for ocr.completed, persists traceability
in PostgreSQL with Liquibase migrations.

Includes unit, integration, and E2E tests.

commit.message:
Add mid-flight CCF verification: read IMC's cached CCF after 0x0E06

After 0x0E06 transfer completes but BEFORE 0x6038 applies config,
read 0x0E02 (List CCF) and 0x0E01 (Report CCF) from IMC to see
what CCF data the IMC actually received from GWM.

Parses response looking for option 467 (display variant) to verify
the IMC has the correct value before DiagnosisManager applies it.
This is the critical diagnostic to determine if the CCF transfer
is delivering wrong data vs DiagnosisManager misapplying correct data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

test(e2e): add comprehensive E2E tests for toggle list and toggle heading

53 new Playwright tests across two files:
- toggle.spec.ts (28 tests): rendering, expand/collapse, body placeholder,
  save data, toolbox creation, markdown shortcut (> ), keyboard behavior
  (Enter creates child, Backspace converts to paragraph), read-only mode
- toggle-heading.spec.ts (25 tests): rendering, aria attributes, expand/collapse,
  block settings toggle heading option, toolbox/markdown shortcut creation,
  save data round-trip, read-only mode

Skipped pre-existing lint errors in unchanged files:
- test/unit/tools/toggle/toggle-bugs.test.ts: import() type annotations
- test/unit/utils/popover-inline.test.ts: prototype spy warning

Fix ViewSurveyResponse: use Filament 5 Schema signature

Filament 5 unified infolist under Filament\Schemas\Schema — the old
Filament\Infolists\Infolist type hint no longer exists as a class,
causing a fatal type compatibility error on every page load.

Fix: use Schema $schema (Filament\Schemas\Schema) as method signature,
keep component imports from Filament\Infolists\Components which still exist.

feat: add dashboard backend endpoints for profile, sessions, memory, checklist, and stats (#469)

Add REST API endpoints to support the new frontend dashboard:

- GET/PUT /api/contractor/profile: view and update contractor profile
- GET /api/contractor/sessions: list conversation sessions with pagination
- GET /api/contractor/sessions/{id}: session transcript with tool interactions
- GET /api/contractor/memory: list memory facts with category filter
- PUT/DELETE /api/contractor/memory/{key}: update or delete facts
- GET/POST/DELETE /api/contractor/checklist: manage checklist items
- GET /api/contractor/stats: overview statistics for the dashboard

All endpoints scoped to the current user via get_current_user dependency.
26 new tests covering all endpoints.

Fixes #458, Fixes #459, Fixes #460, Fixes #461, Fixes #462
